items.claim: Jared Cannonier's chin has shown signs of decline starting with the Caio Borralho fight.
items.quote: the chin really did not start to go south, I believe, until the Caio fight.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier was dropped twice in the first round of his fight against Gregory Rodrigues.
items.quote: Rodriguez knocks him down twice in the first.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has a high-level striking game that includes dangerous spinning attacks.
items.quote: Back-to-back spinning victories with the back elbow, with the backfist against Anders and Tulio.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan will knock out Jared Cannonier early in the fight.
items.quote: I'm going to go first round knockout victory for CLD.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier's age makes it difficult for him to recover if he is dropped early in a fight.
items.quote: If you get dropped again against CLD, are you getting back up? And this time instead of Rodriguez not finishing you, does CLD follow up and then end the fight?

items.claim: Michael Venom Page's fighting style is point-based and lacks aggression.
items.quote: MVP is in and out, in and out, in and out. He's doing his, you know, point style fighting approach.

items.claim: Jacare Souza is an aggressive grappler who looks to finish fights from crucifix or side control positions.
items.quote: he's a very aggressive guy once he actually takes you down, he's looking to get you either in a crucifix or side control position, and he's going to unload elbows or strikes from there.
